subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of God, servant of the Most Exalted Shrine, thy pure-hearted son hath besought the writing of this letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق الهی خادم مقام اعلی پسر پاک گهرت خواهش تحریر این نامه نمود تا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant
